message:
style: cargo fmt across cli, mcp, output, tests, and top-level main

Pure `cargo fmt` sweep. No behavioural or semantic changes; the
diff is entirely trailing-comma insertions, multi-line wraps for
chains that grew beyond width, and removal of trailing whitespace
inside `#[cfg(test)] mod tests { ... }` blocks.

Files touched:
  - src/main.rs
  - src/cli/commands/{agents,close,defer,info,reopen,where}.rs
  - src/logging.rs
  - src/mcp/mod.rs, src/mcp/tools.rs
  - src/output/context.rs
  - src/util/id.rs
  - tests/test_create_deps_colon.rs
  - tests/test_create_parent_standin.rs

Keeping this separate from the issue-lookup recovery work so reviews
of either one are easier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
